name: The Risk Register
effect: Produce a comprehensive risks and assessments document. This card is considered thorough.

clauses.name: COMPLETION CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If the document exceeds forty pages: It is considered complete.

clauses.name: TRIAGE OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If a system fails: Locate the relevant section in the document retroactively.

clauses.name: FORGETFULNESS CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If no one read the document: Responsibility is considered distributed.

witness_quote: It was all in the doc.

translation_layer.skeptical_question: Was this written to be read?
